loop1.title: Cumulative Energy
loop1.note: Showing cumulative energy (kWh/kVArh) for outgoing feeders; subsidy limit and SEC are not measured for this panel.

loop1.title: Today live power analysis
loop1.note: Showing total apparent power, active, and reactive power aggregated from outgoing feeders; rated capacity and worst-peak markers are ungroundable due to missing nameplate ratings on member meters.

loop1.title: Daily Power Demand by Feeder
loop1.note: Showing worst peak power and per-feeder demand trends (UPS, BPDB, HHF); Load Factor and Critical Demand threshold are omitted as they require a nameplate rating or energy counter not available for this panel aggregate.
